goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should depart from 'leicester' and should 'arrive by 15:30'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave on sunday
The train should depart from leicester and should arrive by 15:30
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
